mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,DEPLOY_VERSION AS deployVersion ,DEPLOY_DTTM AS deployDttm ,DEPLOY_SYS_CD AS deploySysCd ,DEPLOY_RESULT_CD AS deployResultCd ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBINTRFCDEPLOYHISTHS WHERE 1=1
AND INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND DEPLOY_RESULT_CD like CONCAT('%',#{deployResultCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by DEPLOY_DTTM desc ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AND p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBINTRFCDEPLOYHISTHS WHERE 1=1
AND INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND DEPLOY_RESULT_CD like CONCAT('%',#{deployResultCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by DEPLOY_DTTM desc

SELECT INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,DEPLOY_VERSION AS deployVersion ,DEPLOY_DTTM AS deployDttm ,DEPLOY_SYS_CD AS deploySysCd ,DEPLOY_RESULT_CD AS deployResultCd FROM TBINTRFCDEPLOYHISTHS WHERE INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} order by DEPLOY_DTTM desc

SELECT INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,DEPLOY_VERSION AS deployVersion ,DEPLOY_DTTM AS deployDttm ,DEPLOY_SYS_CD AS deploySysCd ,DEPLOY_RESULT_CD AS deployResultCd ,RAW_DATA AS rawData ,RESULT_RAW_DATA AS resultRawData FROM TBINTRFCDEPLOYHISTHS WHERE INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND DEPLOY_VERSION = #{deployVersion, jdbcType = NUMERIC}

SELECT INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,DEPLOY_VERSION AS deployVersion ,DEPLOY_DTTM AS deployDttm ,DEPLOY_SYS_CD AS deploySysCd ,DEPLOY_RESULT_CD AS deployResultCd ,RAW_DATA AS rawData ,RESULT_RAW_DATA AS resultRawData FROM TBINTRFCDEPLOYHISTHS WHERE INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND DEPLOY_RESULT_CD like 'SUCCESS%' order by DEPLOY_VERSION desc limit 1
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBINTRFCDEPLOYHISTHS WHERE INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
